name: Roasted Garlic
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground black pepper -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the garlic by carefully cutting away only enough of the root end to flatten it, allowing it to sit upright.
2. From the tapered end of each bulb, slice about 1/4 to 1/2 inch off to expose the cloves, but avoid removing too much of the flesh.
3. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
4. Place the garlic bulbs upright in a baking dish and drizzle with 1-2 tablespoons olive oil.
5. Season lightly with salt and pepper.
6. Cover with aluminum foil and roast for 30-35 minutes, until the cloves are golden brown and the paper has darkened but not burned.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool before serving. The garlic can also be served at room temperature on the table.
